---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement (non-protocol-changing)
title: "[feat] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

> For changes to the **protocol** itself — the attestation schema, trust model, on-chain semantics, token, fees, or slashing — open a **JIP** instead (see the JIP issue template and [`specs/jip-process.md`](../../specs/jip-process.md)).

## Problem

What problem does this solve? Which of Juno's four properties (neutral registry / persistent memory / economic liability / bootstrap) does it serve?

## Proposed solution

What you'd like to see.

## Alternatives considered

Other approaches and why this one.

## Additional context

Anything else.
